diagnostics_hook:
#!/bin/bash
INPUT=$(head -c 65536); FILE=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
[[ "$FILE" != *.vue ]] && { echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; exit 0; }
if command -v vue-tsc >/dev/null 2>&1 || [ -f node_modules/.bin/vue-tsc ]; then
  ERRORS=$(npx vue-tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -F "$FILE" | head -5)
  [ -n "$ERRORS" ] && echo "$ERRORS" >&2
fi
echo '{"decision":"approve"}'
notes: vue-tsc is TypeScript-aware Vue type checking. Required for SFCs with <script lang="ts">.
